name: Carol Sloane
abstract: Carol Sloane (born Carol Morvan; March 5, 1937 – January 23, 2023) was an American singer. She was described by critics as being one of jazz music's most underrated singers and was considered a successor to her predecessor, Ella Fitzgerald.
